items.name: KPI_AvgOpportunitySize_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Average of [Opportunity Amount]"

items.name: KPI_AvgOpportunitySize_Description
items.source_formula: "Average amount of opportunities, whether they are open or closed (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_SalesVelocity_Calculation
items.source_formula: "(""Nb of Open Opp.""  *  ""Avg Deal Size""  *  ""Won/Lost Rate"")  Divided by ""Sales Cycle"""

items.name: KPI_AvgDealSizeWon_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Average of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"

items.name: KPI_SalesVelocity_Description
items.source_formula: "Determines how fast you are making money (you bring back about that much every day) (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_AvgDealSizeWon_Description
items.source_formula: "Average amount of won opportunities (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_TotalClosedOpportunitiesAmount_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""N"" THEN [Amount] END"

items.name: KPI_TotalClosedOpportunitiesAmount_Description
items.source_formula: "Total amount of opportunities that are closed (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_NbClosedOpportunities_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Count Distinct of IF [Open Flag]=""N"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"

items.name: KPI_NbOpportunities_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Count Distinct of [Opportunity Id]"

items.name: KPI_PipelineValue_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"

items.name: KPI_NbWonOpportunities_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Count Distinct of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"

items.name: KPI_NbClosedOpportunities_Description
items.source_formula: "Number of opportunities that are closed"

items.name: KPI_NbOpportunities_Description
items.source_formula: "Total number of opportunities (open or closed)"

items.name: KPI_NbOpenOpportunities_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Count Distinct of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"

items.name: KPI_PipelineValue_Description
items.source_formula: "Total amount of open opportunities (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_NbWonOpportunities_Description
items.source_formula: "Number of opportunities that were won"

items.name: KPI_NbLostOpportunities_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Count Distinct of IF [Won Flag]=""N"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"

items.name: KPI_NbLostOpportunities_Description
items.source_formula: "Number of opportunities that were lost"

items.name: KPI_WeigthedPipelineValue_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Probability %]*[Opportunity Amount] END"

items.name: KPI_WonLostRate_Calculation
items.source_formula: """Nb of Won Opportunities"" Divided by ""Nb of Closed Opportunities"""

items.name: KPI_SalesCycle_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date])   (for closed opportunities only)"

items.name: KPI_WeigthedPipelineValue_Description
items.source_formula: "Total amount of open opportunities, weighted by probability of closing (expressed in currency)"

items.name: KPI_WonLostRate_Description
items.source_formula: "Share of the number of opportunities won in relation to the number of all closed opportunities (expressed in %)"

items.name: KPI_SalesCycle_Description
items.source_formula: "Average time it takes to close an opportunity (only considering won opportunities)"

items.name: KPI_SalesCycleLost_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date])   (for lost opportunities only)"

items.name: KPI_SalesCycleLost_Description
items.source_formula: "Average time it takes to close an opportunity (only considering lost opportunities)"

items.name: KPI_SalesCycleWon_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date])   (for won opportunities only)"

items.name: KPI_TotalSales_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Sum of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"

items.name: KPI_SalesCycleWon_Description
items.source_formula: "Average time it takes to win an opportunity"

items.name: KPI_TotalSales_Description
items.source_formula: "Total amount of opportunities won (expressed in amount)"

items.name: KPI_TotalPipelineGeneration_Calculation
items.source_formula: "Sum of [Opportunity Amount]"

items.name: KPI_TotalPipelineGeneration_Description
items.source_formula: "Total amount of opportunities created (expressed in amount)"

items.name: KPI_ConversionRate_Calculation
items.source_formula: """Total Sales"" Divided by ""Total Closed Opportunities Amount"""

items.name: KPI_ConversionRate_Description
items.source_formula: "Share of the amount of opportunities won in relation to the amount of all closed opportunities (expressed in %)"

items.name: KPI_NbOpenOpportunities_Description
items.source_formula: "Number of opportunities that are currently open"

items.name: Avg Probability (Open Opp.)
items.source_formula: AVG(if [Calculation_1142225515624624133] then [LinPack_574638457904073940] end)

items.name: Is Last N months filter - Closed or Created Date?
items.source_formula: [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] OR [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292]

items.name: One
items.source_formula: max(1)

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (Star)
items.source_formula:
REPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description) (copy)_995858528069312525])," ","★")
+
REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description) (copy)_995858528069312525])," ","☆")

items.name: Type
items.source_formula: IF ISNULL([Opportunity Type]) THEN 'Other' ELSE [Opportunity Type] END

items.name: First Time Closed Won by Account
items.source_formula: {fixed [Calculation_711568759570489345]: min (IF [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" THEN [Calculation_822751375422500864]  END)}

items.name: Is First Time Client?
items.source_formula: IFNULL([Calculation_711568759572205574]="N" and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" and [Calculation_822751375422500864]=[Calculation_614178463385309184], False)

items.name: Client/Prospect by Opportunity
items.source_formula: if [Calculation_822751375422500864]>[Calculation_614178463385309184] then "Existing Clients" else "Prospects" end

items.name: Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (Existing)
items.source_formula: [Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Opp (copy)_614178463390113796] - [Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (copy)_614178463392415753]

items.name: Client/Prospect by Account
items.source_formula: if {fixed [Calculation_711568759570489345]: [LinPack_345685562057570044]}>=1 then "Existing Clients" else "Prospects" end

items.name: Days to Close
items.source_formula: DATEDIFF("day", [__MyToday], [Calculation_822751375422500864])

items.name: Days to Close (bucket)
items.source_formula:
IF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then "Overdue"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then "0-30 days"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then "1-3 months"
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then "3-6 months"
ELSE "> 6 months"
END

items.name: Rank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner)
Opportunity Id
items.source_formula: [Opportunity ID]

items.name: Account
items.source_formula: [Account Name]

items.name: Opportunity Owner
items.source_formula: [First Name]+' '+[Last Name]

items.name: Opportunity Description
items.source_formula: [Name]

items.name: Opportunity Stage
items.source_formula: [Stage]

items.name: Open Flag
items.source_formula: IIF([Closed],"N","Y","Unknown")

items.name: Won Flag
items.source_formula: IIF([Closed] AND [Won],"Y","N","Unknown" )

items.name: Probability %
items.source_formula: [Probability (%)]/100

items.name: Opportunity Created Date
items.source_formula: DATE([Created Date])

items.name: Opportunity Amount
items.source_formula: [Amount]

items.name: Is Closed in Last x Days?
items.source_formula: [Calculation_680325065948213248]>=-1*int([Parameters].[pLastxDays]) and [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="N"

items.name: Open/Won/Lost
items.source_formula:
if [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y" then "Open"
ELSEIF  [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then "Won" 
ELSE "Lost"
end

items.name: Opportunity Close Date
items.source_formula:
[Close Date]
//DATE(DATEADD('month',5,[Close Date]))

items.name: Deal Size Bucket
items.source_formula: split([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",2)

items.name: Open/Won/Lost Icon
items.source_formula:
case [Calculation_747316110822866944]
when "Open" then ""
When "Won" then "✔"
when "Lost" then "✘"
end

items.name: Today
items.source_formula: __MyToday

items.name: Pipeline Review - DONE - Key
items.source_formula:
//Achievements
if      [Calculation_746190227234947072]  then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|Closed Last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days"
ELSEIF  [Closed in Last 7 Days (copy)_746190227235745795] then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|New Opportunities last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days"
else "Other"
end

items.name: Conversion Rate Average (for trends)
items.source_formula: RUNNING_SUM([LinPack_235739231649065059])/RUNNING_SUM([LinPack_707557147340278467])

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Opp
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)

items.name: _Per Customer: Pipeline Generation
items.source_formula: ZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients (copy)_1243275034711019521]})

items.name: Total Sales for Existing Clients
items.source_formula: SUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Existing Clients" AND [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation
items.source_formula:
IF      [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5 then "1" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*2 then "2" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*3 then "3" 
ELSEIF  [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*4 then "4" 
ELSE "5"                                    
END

items.name: Is Created in Last x Days?
items.source_formula: [Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]>=0 and [Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]<=int([Parameters].[pLastxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"

items.name: Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?
items.source_formula: [Calculation_822751375422500864]>DATEADD('month',-[Parameters].[Last x Days (copy)_1142225515621146627],__MyToday) AND [Calculation_822751375422500864] <= __MyToday

items.name: Is Closing in Next x Days?
items.source_formula: [Calculation_680325065948213248]<=int([Parameters].[pNextxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"

items.name: Days to Close (bucket) (sort)
items.source_formula:
IF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then 0
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then 10
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then 20
ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then 30
ELSE 100
END

items.name: Opportunity Type (filter)
items.source_formula: [Opportunity Type]

items.name: Days from Open
items.source_formula: DATEDIFF("day", [Created Date], [__MyToday])

items.name: Deal Size Bucket (sort)
items.source_formula: int(split([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",1))

items.name: Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?
items.source_formula: [Parameters].[Opportunity Owner Parameter]=[Calculation_711568759570620418]

items.name: Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Opp
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of Accounts
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed LOST - Opp Amount
items.source_formula: sum(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)

items.name: Label DONE - New - Nb of Opp
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (New)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" and [Calculation_614178463385661442] then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of Opp
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)

items.name: Label DONE - Closed WON - Opp Amount
items.source_formula: SUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)

items.name: Label DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label DONE - New - Nb of Accounts
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label DONE - New - Opp Amount
items.source_formula: SUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)

items.name: Label DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Client)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Next x days  - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Next x days  - Nb of Accounts (Client)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Next x days  - Nb of Accounts
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts (Client)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Next x days  - Nb of Opp
items.source_formula: COUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Opp Amount
items.source_formula: SUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)

items.name: Label FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Opp Amount
items.source_formula: SUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)

items.name: Is Last N months filter - Created Date?
items.source_formula: [Created Date]>DATEADD('month',-[Parameters].[Last x Days (copy)_1142225515621146627],__MyToday) AND [Created Date] <= __MyToday

items.name: Nb of Owners
items.source_formula: COUNTD([Calculation_711568759570620418])

items.name: Dimension
items.source_formula:
CASE [Parameters].[LinPack_093258324044640973] 
WHEN "Account" THEN [Calculation_711568759570489345] 
WHEN "Open Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572205574] 
WHEN "Opportunity Owner" THEN [Calculation_711568759570620418] 
WHEN "Opportunity Stage" THEN [Calculation_711568759572115461] 
WHEN "Opportunity Type" THEN [Opportunity Type] 
WHEN "Won Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572299783] 
END

items.name: Nb of Open Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)

items.name: Nb of Won Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)

items.name: Sales Cycle
items.source_formula: AVG(FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))

items.name: Weighted Pipeline Value
items.source_formula: SUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759573139467]*[Amount] END))

items.name: _Pipeline Generated (Expression)
items.source_formula: [Amount]

items.name: Nb of Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD([Calculation_711568759570227200])

items.name: _Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)
items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)

items.name: Pipeline Value
items.source_formula: SUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END))

items.name: _Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)
items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END)

items.name: Sales Cycle (won)
items.source_formula: AVG(FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))

items.name: Nb of Closed Opportunities
items.source_formula: COUNTD(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)

items.name: _Total Sales (Expression)
items.source_formula: FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Title
items.source_formula:
IF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "CHAMPIONS"
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "CLOSERS
Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation"
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "HUNTERS/FARMERS
Growth Plan: Closing"
ELSE "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS"
END

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class (sort)
items.source_formula:
IF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN 1
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN 2
ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN 3
ELSE 4
END

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class
items.source_formula:
IF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]
ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] <=3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]
ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] <=3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]
ELSE [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]
END

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Action
items.source_formula:
CASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]                      THEN "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]   THEN "Guide them on how to generate pipeline."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]              THEN "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]           THEN "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business and to win over clients. Train them quickly." 
END

items.name: Opportunity Owner Class - Description
items.source_formula:
CASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004]                      THEN "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas and pull the team up."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789]   THEN "Effective at closing and winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming or hunting)."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998]              THEN "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close and win the deals."
WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303]           THEN "Underperforming in pipeline generation and deal closing.
"   
END

items.name: Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)

items.source_formula:

items.source_formula:
IF      [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5 then "1" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*2 then "2" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*3 then "3" 
ELSEIF  [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*4 then "4" 
ELSE "5"                                    
END

items.name: Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description)
items.source_formula:
CASE [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816]
WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW"
WHEN "2" THEN "LOW"
WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM"
WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH"
WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH"
END
+ " Average Deal Size"

items.name: Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Key
items.source_formula:
IF      [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237216263]        then "Overdue|Closing Overdue"
ELSEIF  [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237490696] then "Next " + [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days|Closing Next "+ [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days"
else "Other"
end
